text.setup: Please be patient as we set up the experiment...
text.instructions:
This is a task with strings of words. They will be presented very quickly one after the other. 

Your task is to determine if the strings are true or false. 

Press '1' with your left middle finger if they are FALSE, and '2' with your left index finger if they are TRUE.

The experiment will take approximately 2 minutes. You will be able to take breaks at set times during the experiment. 
When you are ready, press either '1' or '2' to continue.
text.end:
The experiment is now over! Thank you for your participation! 
Please sit tight while we save the recording...
